plugins.name: project-copilot
plugins.description: Operating model for running complex knowledge-work engagements across sessions. Three-layer knowledge architecture (project-context.md map + Notion brain + file system artifacts), standardized 12-database Notion schema, intelligence classification rules, and weekly/monthly hygiene routines. Project-agnostic: each project brings its own .copilot/config.yaml and project-context.md.

plugins.name: personal-os
plugins.description: Marc Stiller's Personal Operating System. Stage 1: Knowledge Steward (memory ownership, hierarchical compression, Pattern Engine) and Chief of Staff (orchestration, autonomy ladder, daily/weekly/monthly/quarterly cycles). Built on a fixed roster of five System Agents, a library of Specialist roles per domain, and a constitutional decision protocol. State (Constitution, decision log, episodic memory) lives in projects/os/ and Notion; this plugin holds the operating model.
